name: brand-discovery
tagline: Runs structured, resumable multi-session brand-identity interviews across 8 modules into a master brandbook.
verdict: Well-designed, resumable interview skill with disk-persisted state, a clear module sequence, and careful input validation (path traversal, participant-name checks) before writes. No security issues found. Minor gaps: validation-failure recovery isn't spelled out, and there's no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Content: 'hyphens (e.g. `founder-a`, `anna`); reject names containing path separators' — states what to reject but never the recovery flow when validation fails.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the file (line 1: '---').
